patch_analysis: FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/metadata/Routing.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import org.elasticsearch.cluster.ClusterState;', 'import org.elasticsearch.discovery.MasterNotDiscoveredException;', 'public static Routing forMasterNode(RelationName relationName, ClusterState clusterState) {', 'String masterNodeId = clusterState.nodes().getMasterNodeId();', 'if (masterNodeId == null) {', 'throw new MasterNotDiscoveredException();', '}', 'return forTableOnSingleNode(relationName, masterNodeId);', '}', ''], removed_lines=[], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)

FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/metadata/sys/SysAllocationsTableInfo.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['.withRouting((state, ignored, ignored2) -> Routing.forMasterNode(IDENT, state))'], removed_lines=['.withRouting((state, ignored, ignored2) -> Routing.forTableOnSingleNode(IDENT, state.nodes().getMasterNodeId()))'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)

FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/planner/operators/LogicalPlanner.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import org.elasticsearch.ElasticsearchException;', 'if (e instanceof CrateException || e instanceof ElasticsearchException) {'], removed_lines=['if (e instanceof CrateException) {'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)
